functionality_checks.F-03_business_rules: PASS - PIN required before shift open. Only one active shift per cashier. Closing is one-way (status check). Expected cash = opening + cashSales - voids (maintained by payment/void services). Discrepancy notes mandatory for non-zero difference. Closed shifts immutable. Dashboard data real-time from completed transactions only. Report export via sales-summary endpoint.

quality_checks.Q-01_completeness: PASS - All 9 domain stores wired with notifySync() calls on every mutation. sync-trigger.ts provides notifySync() and trackAndSync() wrappers. useSyncStore.ts bridges sync engine to React. SyncStatusIndicator.tsx component created. All 4 layouts include SyncStatusIndicator.
quality_checks.Q-02_type_safety: PASS - sync-trigger.ts imports TableName, SyncableEntity from sync/types. useSyncStore uses SyncProgress, SyncEngineStatus types. All stores import notifySync from @/sync/sync-trigger.
quality_checks.Q-03_error_handling: PASS - SyncStatusIndicator shows distinct states: offline (WifiOff), syncing (spinning RefreshCw), error (AlertCircle with message), idle/online (Wifi). useSyncStore subscribes to sync engine progress for error propagation.
quality_checks.Q-06_naming: PASS - Consistent naming: notifySync() for fire-and-forget trigger, trackAndSync() for tracked mutations, useSyncStore for React bridge, SyncStatusIndicator for UI component.
quality_checks.Q-07_imports: PASS - All stores import from @/sync/sync-trigger. SyncStatusIndicator imports from ./useSyncStore and @/hooks/useOnlineStatus. Layouts import from @/sync/SyncStatusIndicator.
quality_checks.Q-08_foundation: PASS - Uses existing sync engine (syncEngine.requestSync()), change tracker (trackChange()), and useOnlineStatus hook without modification.

functionality_checks.F-01_feature_coverage: PASS - Offline-first sync wiring across all domain stores. Every Dexie DB mutation triggers sync. UI indicator shows sync status in all interfaces.

met: sync-trigger.ts: notifySync() calls syncEngine.requestSync() for debounced sync
sync-trigger.ts: trackAndSync() calls trackChange() then requestSync() for tracked mutations
useSyncStore.ts: Zustand store subscribes to syncEngine progress updates (status, lastSyncedAt, pendingChanges, error)
useSyncStore.ts: Exposes startEngine, stopEngine, syncNow, requestSync actions
SyncStatusIndicator.tsx: Shows offline/syncing/error/online states with appropriate icons and colors
SyncStatusIndicator.tsx: Displays pending changes count badge when > 0
SyncStatusIndicator.tsx: Uses useOnlineStatus hook to detect offline state
useAuthStore: 2 notifySync calls (login:89, updatePermissions:173)
useMenuStore: 8 notifySync calls (addMenuItem, updateMenuItem, deleteMenuItem, toggleAvailability, addCategory, updateCategory, deleteCategory)
useRecipeStore: 4 notifySync calls (addRecipe, updateRecipe, deleteRecipe, linkIngredientToInventory)
useInventoryStore: 6 notifySync calls (addStock, updateItem, deleteItem, restockItem, deductStock, adjustStock)
useOrderManagementStore: 4 notifySync calls (createOrder, addItemsToOrder, updateOrderStatus; cancelOrder delegates to updateOrderStatus)
useKitchenStore: 4 notifySync calls (startCooking, markReady, confirmServed, acknowledgeNotification)
usePaymentStore: 3 notifySync calls (processPayment, applyDiscount, processVoid)
useShiftManagementStore: 3 notifySync calls (openShift, closeShift, recordDiscrepancy)
useSettingsStore: 9 notifySync calls (togglePPN, updatePPNRate, updateRestaurantInfo, configurePaymentMethods, addDiscount, updateDiscount, deleteDiscount, toggleDiscountActive, initializeSettings)
DashboardHubLayout: SyncStatusIndicator in header (line 46)
WaiterCashierLayout: SyncStatusIndicator in header (line 43)
KitchenLayout: SyncStatusIndicator in header (line 47)
AdminLayout: SyncStatusIndicator in header (line 160)
Total: 43 notifySync() calls across 9 stores, 4 layouts with SyncStatusIndicator
All stores use Dexie transactions for atomic multi-table writes before notifySync
All stores set syncStatus='pending' on records before notifySync to mark them for sync
Reporting store (useReportingStore) correctly has NO notifySync - it is read-only computed data

functionality_checks.F-03_business_rules: PASS - Every write operation across all domain stores triggers notifySync() which calls syncEngine.requestSync() (debounced). Records are marked syncStatus='pending' in IndexedDB before sync trigger. The sync engine then batches and pushes changes to the server. Read-only stores (reporting) correctly do not trigger sync. Financial records (transactions, shifts, voidRecords) are correctly written with syncStatus='pending' for append-only sync semantics.
functionality_checks.F-04_cross_domain: PASS - sync-trigger.ts is the single integration point between domain stores and the sync engine. useSyncStore bridges the sync engine singleton to React components via Zustand. SyncStatusIndicator is shared across all 4 layout components. The sync engine (from T-003) handles the actual push/pull/conflict resolution.

structural_fixes.description: Multiple builder tasks (T-013, T-014, T-015, T-018) wrote route and service files to server/routes/ and server/services/ instead of server/src/routes/ and server/src/services/. The server tsconfig.json has rootDir='./src' and include=['src/**/*'], so files outside src/ would not be compiled. Additionally, routes/index.ts imported these as '../../routes/...' which resolves outside the rootDir.
structural_fixes.action: Moved all misplaced files to server/src/, corrected all import paths from '../../src/middleware/auth' to '../../middleware/auth' etc., updated routes/index.ts imports from '../../routes/*' to './*', removed old server/routes/ and server/services/ directories.
structural_fixes.impact: Without this fix, the server would fail to compile with TypeScript errors.
